headline: Can NRG Energy (NRG) Stay Cheap After The LS Power Deal?
summary: NRG Energy’s share price has retreated this year after a very strong three year run, yet the stock still screens as undervalued on broad valuation checks. This puts the recent weakness and the stronger long term return in tension with what the fundamentals are currently suggesting. Over the past three years, NRG Energy has delivered a very large total return of about 3x, which puts today’s softer share price in the context of a substantial prior re rating. The acquisition driven expansion of...
